abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition} or @Compendium[ancient-wonders.ancientwondersmoves.Item.2nqveZCSjAoeApQH]{Establish a Haven} in a ruin, add +1. When you @Compendium[ancient-wonders.ancientwondersmoves.Item.fvxIsI6u73hkrK6J]{Hunker Down} in these locations, you may choose two options on a hit instead of one. If the ruin is alien, take +1 momentum on a hit when making these moves.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} in an abandoned ship or structure and score a hit, you leverage your practical experience scavenging these locations; take +1 supply and +1 momentum. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.75d5b0762ebab856]{Make a Discovery}, you capitalize on your findings; mark one box on your discoveries legacy track instead of marking 2 ticks.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.9c9ab6a42daa96e0]{Swear an Iron Vow} to hunt for a valuable item or lost artifact, reroll any dice. If the sought-after object is not human-made, take an automatic strong hit. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.0d7f13818c1c19ed]{Reach a Milestone} on this quest, take +1 momentum.
